level_signals: 6+ years of experience in technical program management, enterprise software delivery, consulting, professional services, or customer implementations
Mentoring junior TPMs and establishing scalable delivery best practices
Comp range $150K-$170K base OTE consistent with Senior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of experience in technical program management, enterprise software delivery, consulting, professional services, or customer implementations
Proven experience leading complex enterprise deployments involving integrations, multiple stakeholders, and cross-functional delivery teams
Strong technical credibility and comfort discussing integrations, APIs, infrastructure dependencies, and implementation trade-offs
Experience managing enterprise programs across Agile, Waterfall, and Hybrid delivery methodologies
Strong stakeholder management and executive communication skills with the ability to influence alignment across technical and business teams
Highly organized, execution-oriented, and comfortable operating in fast-paced, ambiguous environments
Strong ownership mindset with the ability to proactively drive issues to resolution and maintain delivery momentum
Experience mentoring junior team members or helping establish scalable delivery processes and governance standards

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with conversational AI, LLMs, or enterprise AI deployments
Exposure to CCaaS platforms, APIs, or enterprise integrations such as Genesys, Five9, NICE, or Avaya
Experience supporting pre-sales scoping, SOW development, resource estimation, or delivery planning
PMP, Scrum Master, Agile, or related certifications
Experience working with SIs, GSIs, BPOs, or multi-region enterprise delivery programs
Passion for AI tooling, operational excellence, and delivery process optimization

scope.surface: End-to-end enterprise Agentic AI deployment delivery — from kickoff through go-live and hypercare
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS / professional services, conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: On-time delivery of enterprise AI deployments
Customer satisfaction and go-live success rates
Delivery process scalability and governance maturity
cross_functional_partners: SIs / GSIs / BPOs / external implementation partners
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end delivery across scope, timeline, budget, quality, risks, and dependencies for enterprise AI deployments
Lead implementations from SOW kickoff through design, integration, UAT, production go-live, and hypercare
Serve as the primary delivery contact for enterprise customer stakeholders, including executive sponsors and technical leaders
Coordinate technical delivery across integrations, infrastructure, environments, testing, and deployment readiness
Apply Agile, Waterfall, or Hybrid methodologies based on customer needs and implementation complexity
Mentor junior TPMs and help establish scalable delivery best practices across the broader organization
Support pre-sales activities including delivery scoping, resource estimation, SOW reviews, and implementation risk assessment
Manage co-delivery execution with SIs, GSIs, BPOs, and external implementation partners

compensation.equity_form: equity package mentioned alongside base salary and performance-based variable component (OTE structure)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($150K-$170K base OTE) plus equity
Clear and detailed description of ownership areas and success criteria
High-visibility role with direct enterprise customer executive exposure
Well-known enterprise customers named (Booking.com, Allianz, SAP, TUI) indicating product maturity
Backed by strong investors: General Catalyst, EQT Ventures, Altimeter Capital
red_flags: Location not specified in the JD — remote, hybrid, or onsite status is entirely unclear
Visa sponsorship policy not mentioned despite being an e-verify employer
OTE structure means variable pay component is not quantified, making total comp range ambiguous
Role spans a very broad scope (pre-sales through post-go-live mentoring) which may indicate bandwidth pressure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement + comp range + mentoring expectation)
location.type (not stated in JD; marked unclear)
scope.business_model (inferred from product description and customer list)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from success criteria section; not stated as KPIs)
compensation.base_range_usd (stated as OTE range; whether this is base-only or total OTE is ambiguous)
ambiguities: Compensation is described as OTE (base + variable), but the $150K-$170K range label is 'Salary Range' — it is unclear whether the range represents base salary only or total OTE including variable.
